title: Bestway Sea Creature Paddling Pool Kiddie Swimming Pool, Inflatable Above Ground Pool, Outdoor Garden Pool, Blue, 48 x 10 Inch
features: KIDS PADDLING POOL: Provides endless entertainment and play! Children can learn about different sea creatures and their characteristics due to the pool's design. It will engage them in imaginative play
DURABLE MATERIAL: The kids' paddling pool is made from strong and sturdy, pre-tested vinyl for long-term use, ensuring your kids can create endless summer memories!
EASY SETUP: The paddling pool can be set up and stored in no time! Simply release the pool water with the easy-to-use drain valve
COMFORTABLE: The kids' paddling pool features a soft and comfortable design, providing your little ones with a snug and secure space to build confidence in swimming
COMPLETE SET: Includes 1 pool and a repair patch for longer-lasting use. Water capacity is 219L, and the assembled size is 1.22m x 0.25m
description: From the manufacturer PVC Sidewall Made in long use in mind with rigid heavy-duty transparent PVC sidewall permanently attached sturdy vinyl bottom Ocean Themed Design This paddling pool is great for kids to splash and play in and the outer walls are decorated in a cool, colorful underwater scene! Easy Set Up No tools required, simply fill with water and you will be ready to go, water capacity: 277 L (73gal)
